positive: A highly stylized and vibrant celestial forest scene. The composition features abstract, glowing biomechanical flora and fauna interwoven with geometric constellations, forming a strong central silhouette. Style is Neo-Art Nouveau combined with intricate geometric line art and woodcut print aesthetics. Utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, burnt orange, and glowing gold. The elements should appear like they are carved into a single, unified panel, suitable for textile printing. Focus on clean edges, sharp outlines, and symmetrical balance. Maximalist yet highly organized. Minimal gradients, emphasizing flat color areas and sharp contrasts.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, cartoonish, realistic photography, complex rendering, gradients, depth of field
